rows.label: qev041203_MSG0001
rows.name: Muha~ I managed to arrive somehow-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0002
rows.name:
Is it alright to leave it
around here for "the back"-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's a bit scary being surrounded
like this, but I'm going to
deliver the goods-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Delivery complete-mo! Let's
hurry back to the caravan-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0005
rows.name: Hold on a second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even though you're a merchant, you
think you can just wander off without
letting us check the delivered goods?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0007
rows.name: Muha?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0008
rows.name: N... no, absolutely not-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0009
rows.name:
It seemed like the person in charge wasn't
around, so I was just thinking of heading back
to the entrance to have them confirm it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm the one in charge! I'm going
to check it, so wait right there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0011
rows.name: ………… ...Huh? What the hell is this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0012
rows.name: What's wrong-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0013
rows.name:
Don't play dumb with me! The delivery
count ain't even close to enough! I
demanded three times the usual amount![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0014
rows.name:
That's...! I never heard
anything about that-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0015
rows.name: Shut up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0016
rows.name:
What are you gonna do about it?!
Because of you, we're all gonna
be too starving to move![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0017
rows.name:
Thanks to you, our plans are
ruined! Even if I recalculate
the cash, this is a massive loss![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0018
rows.name: How are you gonna settle this, huh?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0019
rows.name:
Mu, mumumumumumumu! W-well then,
I'll take this matter back with me
and confirm the facts before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0020
rows.name:
Quit your yapping! If you can't
settle this, I don't mind eating
you right here and now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0021
rows.name: Gehahahahahahaha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0022
rows.name: Hi! Hieeeee~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hey, times like this are exactly
when it's your turn-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0024
rows.name:
Protect Mumun... And resolve this situation
peacefully, professionally, and in a way
that doesn't cause us any losses-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0025
rows.name:
Negotiate smoothly and get
this under control-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0026
rows.name: That's what I brought you here for-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0027
rows.name:
Now is the time to work for
the job you accepted-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_JNK0010
rows.name: Compromise

rows.label: qev041203_SEL0011
rows.name: Procure the amount they are demanding.

rows.label: qev041203_JNK0020
rows.name: Fight

rows.label: qev041203_SEL0021
rows.name: Resolve the situation with force.

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0028
rows.name:
Are you serious-mo! If we are
to procure the amount they
requested, that's 14 Eggui-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0029
rows.name:
Gathering them will be a ridiculous amount of
trouble... And what's more, paying you extra
for that work is out of the question-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0030
rows.name: You still want to do it-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0031
rows.name:
But... to get out of here alive,
that might be the only way-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0032
rows.name:
Understood-mo. Let's just bite the
bullet and go search for Eggui-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0033
rows.name:
Y-you don't seriously intend to
fight this many opponents-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0034
rows.name:
It's reckless-mo! There's no way
you can survive-mo! Mumun won't
take responsibility for this-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0035
rows.name: Y-you still want to do it-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0036
rows.name: ...Understood-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0037
rows.name:
Well then, Mumun will hide in the
shadows so as not to get in the way-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0065
rows.name:
Hah? You still haven't gotten the goods?
Hurry up and bring the 14 Eggui![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0066
rows.name:
If you keep dawdling around, I'll
just eat you right here and now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0038
rows.name: Oh, you're finally back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0039
rows.name:
T-thank you for your
continued patronage-mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0040
rows.name:
So? You made sure you brought the
right amount of goods, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0041
rows.name:
Not bad at all! With this
many Eggui, we won't be
struggling for food for a while![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0042
rows.name:
U-umm... So, about the
additional fee-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0043
rows.name: Hah? Are you sleep talking or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0044
rows.name:
You're the ones who got the
count wrong! I don't give a
damn about any "additional" fee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0045
rows.name:
That can't be true-mo~! Gathering
that many Eggui was a to-die-for
amount of trouble-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0046
rows.name:
From now on, make sure you don't
get the count wrong again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0047
rows.name:
Be grateful that I'm letting you
off the hook this time around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0048
rows.name: Mu, mumumumu~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0049
rows.name:
Now I'm angry-mo! Today is the
last time we do business-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0050
rows.name:
Business terminated! Our relationship
with you ends right here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0051
rows.name:
Oh, is that so? You sure you
ain't gonna regret saying that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0052
rows.name:
When a merchant lets someone look down
on their business, it's all over-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0053
rows.name:
I see. So you're saying you won't
do business with us anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0054
rows.name: That's exactly right-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0055
rows.name:
Well then, I guess we have no
choice but to attack you by
force. Your caravan, I mean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0056
rows.name: Muha!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0057
rows.name:
If you don't wanna sell the goods,
we ain't got no other choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0058
rows.name: Mu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0059
rows.name: Mumu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0060
rows.name: Muhahahahahaha~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0061
rows.name:
I was just joking-mo! There's no
way I was serious about quitting
business with the Bias-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0062
rows.name: Damn right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0063
rows.name:
I look forward to your continued
patronage-mo! Man~ we had some
good business today-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041203_MSG0064
rows.name: Muha, muha... Muhahahahahaha~![ST:wait ]
